summary: Iteration 2 end-to-end testing of NECROLINK rebrand + new Events/News/Store/Orders/Registrations features. Backend: 34/34 pytest cases passed (100%). Frontend: NECROLINK branding live, all 7 public nav links present, Events/News/Store/Admin pages all functional. Critical user flows verified end-to-end: event registration (public modal -> success message), order placement creates orders with game_id captured, admin login (both new admin@necrolink.com and legacy admin@darknet.com work), admin dashboard shows live data and all 8 tabs working. No critical issues.

minor.issue: Multipart upload validates content-type from client header (image/*). If a client lies about content-type, only the binary write would still occur. Consider sniffing magic bytes for production.
Raw ObjectId() conversion - invalid IDs will return 500 with 'is not a valid ObjectId' instead of 404. Wrap in try/except and return 404.
All public POST endpoints (registrations/orders/applications) lack rate-limiting or captcha - vulnerable to spam.
Carried over from iter1: still no brute-force lockout (playbook recommends 5-fail lockout).

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='tab-overview' is missing on the Overview tab button (only 7 of 8 tabs have testids). Tab is still functional as default view.

issues: Uses browser-native datetime-local picker (mm/dd/yyyy, --:-- --) instead of shadcn Calendar component - inconsistent with cyberpunk theme but functional.
When product image_url is missing or blocked, default placeholder box icon shown - acceptable.

action_items: Add data-testid='tab-overview' to the Overview tab button in AdminDashboard for test consistency.
Wrap ObjectId() conversions in events/news/products endpoints with try/except to return 404 instead of 500 on invalid IDs.
Consider switching admin event datetime picker from native input to shadcn Calendar for theme consistency.
Add rate-limiting on public POST endpoints (/api/event-registrations, /api/orders, /api/applications) before production launch.
(Carry-over) Implement brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login per playbook (5-fail threshold).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py grew to 804 lines (was 491) - urgently needs refactor into modules: routes_events.py, routes_news.py, routes_store.py, routes_orders.py, services/storage.py, services/auth.py.
Many endpoints repeat the pattern `ObjectId(id)` -> 500 on invalid hex. Centralize into a helper that returns 404.
Order pricing logic (unit_price * quantity) trusts server-side product price (good), but does NOT validate quantity > 0 - a negative/zero quantity would create $0 or negative orders.
PATCH endpoints accept `status` as a query param string with no enum validation - admin could set arbitrary statuses like 'foo'. Add Literal/Enum validation.
Storage key is a module-global with manual re-init on 403. In a multi-worker uvicorn setup this is race-y; use a per-request init or asyncio.Lock.
/api/event-registrations DELETE-on-event-cascade is correct but performed AFTER the delete - if registrations delete fails the event is already gone (acceptable but worth logging).

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional - all critical flows verified end-to-end via Playwright: NECROLINK branding, 7 nav links, Events page + register modal + success message, Store page + Merchandise/Top-Up tabs + buy buttons, News page + category filters + pinned section, Admin login (new + legacy), Admin dashboard 8 tabs (7 with testids), event create form open, orders/registrations data visible with game_id captured.

test_credentials: New admin: admin@necrolink.com / Necrolink2024! - VERIFIED working. Legacy admin: admin@darknet.com / DarkNet2024! - VERIFIED still works.
seed_data_creation: Backend seed verified: 2 members (NECROLINK_Shadow, NECROLINK_Phantom), 2 announcements, 3 events (Friday Night Clash, NECROLINK Dark Cup 2026, Rank Push Night), 2 news articles, 8 products (4 merchandise + 4 topup). All present in DB and rendered on UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite: /app/backend/tests/test_necrolink_api.py (34 tests, covers full Events/Registrations/News/Products/Orders/Stats/Upload/Auth). Run via: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://voltage-victory.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_necrolink_api.py -v. SendGrid email is MOCKED via placeholder key (silent fail OK - DB record always created). Object storage uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and is functional (verified upload+download of 1x1 PNG). Frontend data-testids: events-title, store-title, news-title, admin-dashboard-title, tab-{events,registrations,news,products,orders,applications,announcements} (tab-overview MISSING), register-event-{id}, buy-product-{id}, edit-event-{id}, delete-event-{id}, new-event-btn, save-event-btn etc. All admin mutations use httpOnly JWT cookies via axios withCredentials.
rca of the issue: N/A - no critical bugs identified in this iteration. Minor missing data-testid for tab-overview noted under frontend_issues.
